Stop Hallucinations. Start Building AI That Knows Your Business. 🧠
You’ve built an AI chatbot.
It answers questions beautifully…
Until someone asks:
“What’s our vacation policy?”
The AI confidently replies…
With the wrong answer.
Or worse…
It invents one.
This problem is called hallucination, and it’s one of the biggest challenges when building AI applications.
Fortunately, there’s a better approach.
It’s called Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG).
Instead of relying only on what a Large Language Model learned during training, RAG allows the model to retrieve the most relevant information from your own data before generating an answer.
That’s how companies build AI assistants that can answer questions using:
📄 Internal documentation
📚 Knowledge bases
📑 PDFs
💼 HR policies
📦 Product documentation
